name: Lime Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix 1 cup flour, margarine and powdered sugar until combined.
3. Press the mixture into an ungreased baking pan, 8x8" or 9x9", forming a layer with about half the sides raised.
4. Bake for 20 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, beat the remaining ingredients until light and fluffy, approximately 3 minutes.
6. Pour the beaten mixture over the baked layer.
7. Continue baking until no indentation remains when touched in the center, about 25 minutes.
8. Allow to cool completely.
9. Sprinkle with additional powdered sugar if desired.
10. Cut into squares.
